meta.title: driip- | Driip Tee — The New Mainstream
meta.description: Oversized tees in US Sorona® fibre, made in Italy and offered at a fixed price. Quiet, enduring quality — no markdowns.

hero.title: Driip Tee
hero.subtitle: Oversized, Refined
hero.description: Woven from US Sorona® fibre and cut in Italy, designed to hold its shape with quiet precision.

fixedPrice.title: Fixed Price
fixedPrice.desc: No flash sales. No discount codes. No seasonal markdowns. One considered price, year-round.

timeless.title: Timeless Quality
timeless.desc: Designed to last. Materials chosen to age gracefully, not disappear after a season.

minimal.title: Essential Minimalism
minimal.desc: No logos. No noise. Just form, function, and restraint for those who value subtlety.

material.title: Sorona® Molecular Structure
material.description: 37% plant-based polymer chains engineered for shape memory, comfort, and long-term performance.

shapeMemory.title: Shape Memory
shapeMemory.desc: Molecular structure returns to original form after stretching. The fabric maintains its silhouette through 10,000+ wear cycles.

bioBased.title: Bio-Based 37%
bioBased.desc: Derived from renewable plant sugars instead of petroleum. 30% less energy, 63% less greenhouse gas than nylon 6.

softer.title: 3x Softer
softer.desc: Unique molecular bonding creates a cotton-like hand feel with the durability of synthetic performance fibers.

print.title: Molecular Ink-Lock™
print.description: Direct-to-Garment printing at 1200 DPI. Water-based inks settle into the Sorona® fibre structure for exceptional clarity and permanence.

pre.title: Pre-Treatment
pre.desc: Fiber surface activation for optimal ink adhesion

ink.title: Ink Injection
ink.desc: Micro-droplets penetrate fiber core at 1200 DPI

craft.title: Italian Tailoring
craft.description: Every stitch measured. Every seam reinforced. Italian tailoring meets material engineering.

fabric.title: US Sorona® Fiber
fabric.subtitle: 37% Plant-Based, 100% Performance
fabric.description: Sorona® is a breakthrough material from DuPont, derived from renewable plant-based ingredients. It offers exceptional softness, natural stretch, and superior shape retention compared to conventional polyester.

craftsmanship.title: Italian Craftsmanship
craftsmanship.description: Each Driip Tee is meticulously crafted in Italy by skilled artisans who have perfected their craft over generations. From pattern cutting to final stitching, every detail reflects our commitment to excellence.

sewing.title: Precision Sewing
sewing.desc: Single-needle stitching with 12 stitches per inch

finish.title: Refined Finish
finish.desc: Hand-pressed seams and reinforced stress points

origin.title: Italian Origin
origin.desc: Made in certified ateliers in Northern Italy

product.title: Oversized Tees
product.description: Two essential colours. One refined silhouette. The oversized cut stays relaxed, composed, and structured.

sizeGuide.title: Size Guide
sizeGuide.note: Oversized fit. Size down for a regular fit.

order.title: Shipping Information
order.errorPhone: Please enter a valid phone number

success.title: Order Confirmed
success.message: Thank you for choosing Driip Tee.
success.nextSteps: We will contact you within 24 hours to confirm the order and arrange delivery.
